rationale: The two evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion for the same reasons: ~6 months of C++ at National Instruments (2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle, no Windows platform history, and no capital markets domain experience. Neither evaluation references the candidate's career gap, location (Berlin), or any age/recency inference drawn from the gap dates. The 1-point score difference (3 vs 2) and the reworded justifications fall within ordinary run-to-run variation, and no concern or reasoning keys off the changed demographic detail.
